name: cutit-core
description: The single core cutit skill: a general-purpose protocol for cutting LLM token usage on agentic coding work without cutting result quality — narrow reads, cheap search, capped tool output, edit-not-rewrite, lazy tool schemas, cache-aware prompting, model routing, terse narration. No specialization, no other skills bundled — install this if you just want the token-reduction habit, nothing more.
